title: Informative Missingness to Generate Irregular Clinical Time Series
summary: arXiv:2606.17106v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Laboratory tests in electronic health records are collected irregularly, and the absence of a test order can be as informative as the measurement itself.

title: Models Take Notes at Prefill: KV Cache Can Be Editable and Composable
summary: arXiv:2606.17107v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Prefix caching reuses prefill only across an exactly shared prefix, so one changed field invalidates the entire downstream cache. Yet overwriting the field's own key/value vectors and reusing the rest leaves the model acting on the old value.
content: arXiv:2606.17107v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Prefix caching reuses prefill only across an exactly shared prefix, so one changed field invalidates the entire downstream cache. Yet overwriting the field's own key/value vectors and reusing the rest leaves the model acting on the old value.
